Software developer

I'm Adam Zafir.

Software developer and founder of PyCollab. I build web and Swift products with clear structure and thoughtful interfaces.

Email me GitHub

Build fast, but leave the rough edges behind.

Design decisions should support the product, not distract from it.

Good software earns trust through clarity and restraint.

Selected work

Projects with a clear job to do.

PyCollab Collaboration tool

Realtime collaborative Python in the browser.

A zero-setup coding environment built for shared momentum. Open a tab, start writing, and collaborate without setup overhead.

Open project
Scripties Product + UI

Speech writing and rehearsal with pacing feedback.

A speaking tool focused on structure, delivery, and keeping rehearsal sessions measurable instead of vague. Built as part of the Swift Accelerator Programme 2025 alongside Chan Yap Long, Divya Dharshini Krishnamoorthy, and Ethan Soh Yi Teng.

Open project
Cats By Adam Side project

A lighter project that keeps the personal work human.

Not everything needs to be serious to be useful. This project is a reminder that personality still matters in a portfolio.

Open project
